calendar.empty: No upcoming releases from your library this month.

login.instruction_enter_credentials: Enter your Stremio credentials on the page that opens.
login.instruction_synced: That's it. The TV will sync instantly.

auto.results_are_ranked_by_closest_match: Results are ranked by closest match.
auto.use_the_chips_above_or_type_a_few_l: Use the chips above or type a few letters with the keyboard.
auto.try_a_shorter_or_slightly_different: Try a shorter or slightly different title.
auto.try_different_filters_to_discover_s: Try different filters to discover something new.
auto.no_sources_found_for_this_filter: No sources found for this filter.
auto.control_profile_playback_and_device: Control profile, playback and device preferences in one place.
auto.using_local_preferences_on_this_dev: Using local preferences on this device.
auto.your_playback_subtitle_and_interfac: Your playback, subtitle and interface preferences are ready.
auto.manage_your_profile_connections_and: Manage your profile, connections and sources here.
auto.sign_out_and_switch_to_another_prof: Sign out and switch to another profile.
auto.how_rows_and_home_shelves_look: How rows and home shelves look.
auto.show_that_shelf_as_posters_or_episo: Show that shelf as posters or episode cards.
auto.choose_episode_stills_or_regular_ar: Choose episode stills or regular artwork for series.
auto.how_far_right_arrow_should_jump: How far right arrow should jump.
auto.how_far_left_arrow_should_rewind: How far left arrow should rewind.
auto.tune_readability_on_tv_and_mobile: Tune readability on TV and mobile.
auto.refresh_the_app_after_playback_or_n: Refresh the app after playback or network changes.
auto.sign_out_from_the_active_profile_on: Sign out from the active profile on this device.
auto.makes_the_background_and_bottom_bar: Makes the background and bottom bar pure black.
auto.turns_off_app_wide_transitions_and_: Turns off app-wide transitions and card animations.
auto.add_stremio_or_cloudstream3_addons_: Add Stremio or CloudStream3 addons from one place
addons.search_error: Addon search is unavailable right now.
auto.no_plugins_found_in_this_repository: No plugins found in this repository.
auto.movies_and_shows_you_saved_to_watch: Movies and shows you saved to watch later.
toast.trakt_device_code_expired: Trakt.tv code expired. Please try again.
player.error_network: Could not connect to the internet.
home.add_catalog_addon: Add a Stremio metadata or catalog addon to show content here.
settings.home_catalogs_desc: Choose which catalog rows appear on the home screen.
settings.top_10_catalogs_desc: Show large ranking numbers for selected home catalog rows.
settings.show_hero_section_desc: Shows or hides the large featured banner on the home screen.
settings.language_desc: Changes app text and catalog labels.
settings.start_page_desc: Chooses which screen opens after profile selection.
settings.background_playback_desc: Keeps playback running when the app is in the background.
settings.picture_in_picture_desc: Shows the player in a floating window when supported.
settings.notifications_desc: Allows app status and playback notifications.
settings.discord_rich_presence_desc: Show what you're watching on your Discord profile.
settings.integrations_desc: Optional third-party API keys that add richer metadata. Each works independently — leave any blank to skip it.
settings.tmdb_api_key_desc: Use your TMDB API key for optional metadata features.
settings.rpdb_api_key_desc: Bakes rating overlays directly onto posters. Get a key at ratingposterdb.com.
settings.omdb_api_key_desc: Adds Rotten Tomatoes and Metascore ratings. Get a free key at omdbapi.com/apikey.aspx.
settings.fanart_api_key_desc: Adds HD logos and backdrops for movies. Get a free key at fanart.tv/get-an-api-key.
settings.alert_new_episodes_desc: Notifies when upcoming episodes are released in your device timezone.
settings.default_player_desc: Chooses which player opens streams by default.
settings.stream_source_selection_desc: Controls whether Fluxa waits for manual source selection or picks a source automatically.
settings.regex_pattern_desc: Picks the first source whose title, addon, URL, or binge group matches this pattern.
settings.mpv_custom_options_desc: One key=value per line. Applied on top of defaults. Lines starting with # are ignored.
settings.gif_autoplay_desc: Play focus GIFs as soon as their tiles are visible. Turn off to play them only while hovering.
settings.anime_upscaling_desc: Auto applies bundled Anime4K shaders only when anime is detected. Higher quality presets need a stronger GPU.
settings.frame_interpolation_desc: Uses mpv's display-resample interpolation for smoother motion. This is not RIFE/AI interpolation.
settings.auto_play_next_episode_desc: Starts the next episode automatically when the current one ends.
settings.auto_play_countdown_desc: How long to wait before the next episode plays automatically.
settings.try_binge_group_desc: When the next episode starts, prefer a source with the same Stremio binge group.
settings.playback_speed_desc: Sets the normal playback speed for videos.
settings.resume_playback_desc: Continues from the last saved position when you reopen a title.
settings.forward_rewind_desc: Sets how far the seek buttons jump forward or back.
settings.hold_to_speed_desc: Temporarily speeds up playback while you hold the video.
settings.hold_speed_desc: Playback speed used while holding the screen.
settings.buffer_cache_desc: Limits how much playback and torrent buffer data can be kept.
settings.forward_buffer_desc: How many seconds ahead the player tries to keep ready.
settings.back_buffer_desc: How many seconds behind the current position are retained.
settings.timezone_conversion_desc: Converts timezone-aware addon release times to this device timezone.
settings.ffmpeg_audio_desc: Prefer FFmpeg for audio formats like DTS, TrueHD, FLAC, Vorbis and Opus.
settings.dv_fallback_desc: Chooses how Dolby Vision profile 7 streams are adapted when direct playback is unreliable.
settings.dv_rpu_mode_desc: Selects the libdovi RPU conversion mode. MEL is safest; Profile 8 gives the best output on capable hardware.
settings.dv_zero_level5_desc: Zeros active-area offsets in RPU metadata. Fixes black bars on some content with incorrect Level 5 data.
settings.dv_hdr10plus_mode_desc: Controls whether HDR10+ SEI NALs are stripped during DV8.1 RPU conversion. Auto strips them to prevent tone mapping conflicts.
settings.dv7_fallback_desc: Treats Dolby Vision profile 7 HLS/DASH variants as HDR10 when DV7 playback is not supported.
settings.dv7_to_dv8_fallback_desc: Treats Dolby Vision profile 7 HLS/DASH variants as profile 8.1 on DV8-capable devices.
settings.tunneled_playback_desc: Uses Android tunneled playback on devices that support it.
settings.audio_decoder_mode_desc: Controls which decoders are used for audio playback.
settings.fps_counter_desc: Shows a real-time frame rate counter in the top-right corner of the player.
settings.use_introdb_desc: Fetches intro and outro timestamps from IntroDB.
settings.use_aniskip_desc: Fetches anime opening, ending, and recap timestamps from AniSkip.
settings.auto_skip_desc: Skips available segments automatically without showing the skip card.
settings.anime_use_mpv_desc: Automatically switches to MPV player when anime content is detected.
settings.next_episode_threshold_desc: Shows the next episode card after playback reaches this point.
settings.watched_threshold_desc: Marks the current item as watched after playback reaches this point.
settings.preferred_audio_language_desc: First audio language to try when multiple tracks are available.
settings.secondary_audio_language_desc: Fallback audio language if the preferred one is unavailable.
settings.preferred_subtitle_language_des: First subtitle language to enable automatically.
settings.secondary_subtitle_language_des: Fallback subtitle language if the preferred one is unavailable.
settings.subtitle_text_desc: Controls subtitle text color and opacity.
settings.subtitle_background_desc: Controls the caption background color and opacity.
settings.subtitle_outline_desc: Controls subtitle outline color and opacity.
profiles.select_profile_hint: Choose a profile to enter your personal library and recommendations.
profiles.remote_hint: Use the D-pad to move between profiles.
settings.switch_profiles_desc: Return to the profile picker without signing out of connected services.
player.source_selection_subtitle: Switch source for quality or language.
toast.simkl_client_missing: Simkl client id is not configured.
login.stremio_failed: Stremio: sign-in failed. Check your credentials.
login.local_network_missing: No local network connection found. Check your Wi-Fi settings.
profiles.name: Profile Name
profiles.pin_prompt: Enter the PIN for this profile.
detail.mark_episode_through_watched: Mark episodes up to this episode as watched
detail.mark_episode_through_unwatched: Mark episodes up to this episode as unwatched
detail.mark_through_season_watched: Mark seasons up to this season as watched
detail.mark_through_season_unwatched: Mark seasons up to this season as unwatched
detail.prev_seasons_dialog_body: %s not watched yet. Mark as watched too?
settings.detail_page_view_mode_desc: Choose how episode cards are shown on detail pages.
settings.trailer_on_hero_desc: Show trailer button on the detail page hero.
settings.blur_unwatched_episodes_desc: Dim episodes to distinguish watched from unwatched.
settings.cw_keep_scheduled_desc: Also show episodes airing this week in Continue Watching, not just the This Week row.
downloads.delete_confirm_message: This will remove the downloaded video and its files.
settings.remaining_format_desc: Show remaining time as duration or percentage
settings.progress_direction_desc: Show how much is remaining or how much has been watched
integration.credentials_notice: Your credentials are sent directly to your TV device.
integration.success_message: You can return to the TV screen.
settings.sync_with_desc: Connect external services for watched state, anime episode tracking, and library sync.
settings.tmdb_cast_images_desc: Use TMDB profile images for cast lists.
settings.tmdb_episode_images_desc: Use TMDB stills for episode artwork.
settings.tmdb_logos_backdrops_desc: Use TMDB logos and background images.
settings.tmdb_ratings_desc: Fetch TMDB rating and vote data.
settings.download_dir_desc: Folder where downloaded videos are saved.
settings.downloads_desc: Choose how downloads pick sources and subtitles.
settings.download_source_selection_desc: Controls which stream Fluxa chooses when downloading episodes.
settings.download_subtitle_desc: Automatically attach a subtitle from inline tracks or subtitle addons.
discover.hover_title_hint: Hover a title to see details
discover.install_addons_hint: Install addons from Settings to browse content.
home.install_addon_start: Install an addon to get started.
library.add_titles_hint: Add titles to your list from any detail page.
library.start_watching_hint: Start watching something and it will appear here.
library.completed_hint: Titles you mark as completed will appear here.
library.dropped_hint: Titles you mark as dropped will appear here.
player.incompatible_desktop_stream: This stream does not look compatible with the desktop player.
player.no_playable_url: No playable URL found for this stream.
settings.diagnostic_mode_desc: Record detailed app and player activity to a log file to help track down problems
settings.diagnostic_export_desc: Save the diagnostic log as a file you can share with the developer
settings.diagnostic_export_failed: Could not save the diagnostic file
profiles.active_profile_desc: You are watching with this profile.
profiles.add_profile_hint: For a personal list and settings
profiles.duplicate_name: This name is already used by another profile.
profiles.pin_set_placeholder: PIN is set — leave blank to keep it
profiles.pin_will_be_removed: PIN will be removed when you save.
profiles.empty_create_hint: No profiles yet. Create a new profile to start.
profiles.form_subtitle: Edit the image, color and profile name. Changes appear in profile selection on this device.
search.try_shorter_or_genre: Try a shorter title or a different genre
settings.automatic_updates_desc: Automatically check for updates and notify you
settings.detail_season_posters_on_hero_d: Show season posters in the hero area on the detail screen
settings.episode_cards_layout_desc: Choose the appearance of the episode list
settings.hdr_playback_desc: Play HDR content in HDR mode when supported
settings.p2p_enabled_desc: Allow peer-to-peer (BitTorrent) streams. Disable to block all torrent playback.
p2p.dialog.first_time_body: This stream uses peer-to-peer (BitTorrent) technology. Your IP address may be visible to other peers while streaming. Only continue if you're comfortable with this.
p2p.dialog.disabled_body: This stream requires peer-to-peer (BitTorrent) playback, which is currently turned off. Enable P2P to watch this content.
settings.home_season_posters_on_hero_des: Show season posters in the hero area for series
settings.notifications_master_desc: Turn all app notifications on or off
settings.reduce_motion_desc: Stops animations and speeds up UI transitions
settings.season_selector_desc: Choose the appearance of the season navigator
settings.subtitle_shadow_desc: Add a semi-transparent black shadow to subtitle text
player.cast_no_devices: No devices found on this network.
appearance.sidebar_mode_desc: Show sidebar only on hover or keep it always visible.
appearance.bar_rotation_desc: Move the navigation bar around the screen
appearance.items_rotation_desc: Align navigation items inside the bar
settings.seek_thumbnails_desc: Show a thumbnail preview when hovering over the seekbar. Uses a hidden mpv instance — may increase memory and CPU usage.
welcome.headline: Everything you watch, in one place.
welcome.subheadline: Track movies and shows, connect streaming sources, and keep your watchlist in sync — all on your desktop.
welcome.local_note: Everything stays local on your device. You can connect accounts later from Settings.
auth.error.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.error.network: Something went wrong. Check your connection and try again.
auth.nuvio.title: Sign in with Nuvio
auth.nuvio.subtitle: Use your Nuvio account credentials
auth.nuvio.import.title: Importing from Nuvio
nuvio.status.offline: Nuvio servers unreachable — using local data
auth.profile.title: Set up your profile
auth.profile.subtitle: Give your primary profile a name. You can always change it later.
